creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes virtualbox complaints with a scary warning, but it's not really an invalid settings,

Please use VBoxSVGA with 3d acceleration disabled and everything will work fine. Just ignore the warning. This is the best that can be done with the present software.

Maybe it is possible to make clipboard sharing work with VMSVGA work but I'm unable to do that. It requires performing software development on the driver and maybe also in FreeBSD.  3c acceleration bypass can be even more difficult.

At some point this will be documented in the pkg-message.

Marking as duplicate of similar bug report.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 254266 ***
